calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2017 Vacated

Defendants W. Wong Construction., Inc. And Washington Wongs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate, Or In The Alternative, Continue Trial Date
Off Calendar Sep-12-2017 Off Calendar

Defendants W. Wong Construction Co., Inc And Washington Wong'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Case(S): #Cgc-16-553129, #Cgc-16-554969, And #Cgc-17-556747 (Transaction Id # 17233022)
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS WASHINGTON WONG and W. WONG CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.'s Motion To Consolidate Case(S): #CGC-16-553129, #CGC-16-554969, And #CGC-17-556747 is GRANTED in part. Per the reply papers, 553129 has settled and thus there is no point in consolidating it with the other two cases. 554969 and 556747 are consolidated for all purposes. 554969 is the lead case and all further filings must be in that case only. There is significant overlap between the two cases warranting that they be consolidated. This order is without prejudice to defendant Fire Insurance Exchange asking the trial judge to sever the claims against it from all the other claims. The September 27, 2017 case management conference previously set in 554969 now applies to both consolidated cases. The October 25, 2017 case management conference previously set in 556747 is vacated. Written order is signed and filed in open court in cases CGC-554969 and CGC-17-556747 only.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (D302)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Set For Trial On Oct-02-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-24-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
